title: Realistic Physics
description: A library mod containing core functionality needed for xBigEllx's Realistic Block Physics mod.
body:
**Description**
---
Realistic Physics is a library mod containing core functionality needed for xBigEllx's Realistic Block Physics mod. This mod does not provide any additional features to Minecraft on its own.


**Dependent Mods**
---
These are the mods that are currently dependent on Realistic Physics.
- [Realistic Block Physics](https://modrinth.com/mod/realistic-block-physics)
